pi_items.source: Verified in setup_task.sh (line 35, 45) and export_result.sh (line 14) where username 'sconnor' is queried from login_authentication table
Verified in direct_db_setup.sh (line 86) which inserts: INSERT INTO user_profiles (id, profile, title) VALUES (2, 'teacher', 'Teacher'). Verifier.py also confirms profile_id 2 is Teacher (line 57)

Verified in setup_task.sh (lines 38, 45) where staff record for 'Sarah Connor' is inserted and cleaned up. Also verified in export_result.sh (line 20) which queries staff WHERE first_name='Sarah' AND last_name='Connor'
Verified in direct_db_setup.sh (line 86) which assigns id=2 to Teacher profile. Verifier.py (line 55) checks if profile_id=='2'
Verified in task.json description: 'Login to OpenSIS with username admin'. Also in direct_db_setup.sh (line 11) ADMIN_USER='admin' and inserted in line 127
Verified in direct_db_setup.sh (line 12) ADMIN_PASS='Admin@123' and used to generate password hash (lines 65, 67). Task.json description states 'password Admin@123'

Verified in install_opensis.sh (line 159) OPENSIS_VERSION='V9.2' and downloaded from github.com/OS4ED/openSIS-Classic/archive/refs/tags/V9.2.tar.gz. GitHub releases page confirms V9.2 exists (released Oct 30, 2024)
Verified in install_opensis.sh (line 160) downloads from this repository. Web search confirms OS4ED is official maintainer of openSIS Classic
Verified in setup_task.sh (line 29), direct_db_setup.sh (line 8), and setup_opensis.sh showing DB_NAME='opensis'

Data is generated via SQL INSERT statements in direct_db_setup.sh. Demo school (Demo School, 123 Main St, City, ST) is fictional. Admin user, profiles (admin, teacher, student, parent), and staff records are all created programmatically for testing. No real student/staff data imported.

privileged_info_summary: The create_staff_login task operates on OpenSIS v9.2, an open-source Student Information System from OS4ED. All verified data includes: target username 'sconnor' for a new user account with profile_id 2 (Teacher) to be linked to existing staff member 'Sarah Connor'. The system runs on a synthetic database with demo school (Demo School, 123 Main St) and admin credentials (username: admin, password: Admin@123). Database credentials are opensis_user / opensis_password_123. All data structures (user profiles, staff records, school configuration) are created programmatically during setup for testing purposes.
